Kql: datatable(g:string, v:long)[ "a",3, "a",1, "a",2, "b",5, "b",4 ] | summarize sortedlist=make_list(v) by g | extend issorted=(sortedlist == array_sort_asc(sortedlist))
Sql: SELECT *, (sortedlist = LIST_SORT(sortedlist)) AS issorted FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(LIST(v), []) AS sortedlist FROM (VALUES ('a', 3), ('a', 1), ('a', 2), ('b', 5), ('b', 4)) AS t(g, v) GROUP BY ALL)

Kql: datatable(v:long, w:real)[ 1,1.5, 2,2.5, 3,3.5 ] | summarize wsum=sum(v*w), wavg=avg(v*w), prod_list=make_list(v*w)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(v * w), 0) AS wsum, COALESCE(AVG(v * w), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS wavg, COALESCE(LIST(v * w), []) AS prod_list FROM (VALUES (1, 1.5), (2, 2.5), (3, 3.5)) AS t(v, w)

Kql: datatable(k:long)[ 1,1,2,2,2,3 ] | summarize c=count() by k | summarize histo=make_bag(pack(tostring(k), c))
Sql: SELECT histogram(json_object(TRY_CAST(k AS TEXT), c)) AS histo FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (VALUES (1), (1), (2), (2), (2), (3)) AS t(k) GROUP BY ALL)
